pokemon:flapple.name: Flapple
pokemon:flapple.summary: It flies on wings of apple skin and spits a powerful acid. It can also change its shape into that of an apple.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It flies on wings of apple skin and spits a powerful acid. It can also change its shape into that of an apple.
It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It flies on wings of apple skin and spits a powerful acid. It can also change its shape into that of an apple.

pokemon:applin.name: Applin
pokemon:applin.summary: As soon as it’s born, it burrows into an apple. Not only does the apple serve as its food source, but the flavor of the fruit determines its evolution.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: As soon as it’s born, it burrows into an apple. Not only does the apple serve as its food source, but the flavor of the fruit determines its evolution.
It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokémon, by pretending it’s just an apple and nothing more.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: As soon as it’s born, it burrows into an apple. Not only does the apple serve as its food source, but the flavor of the fruit determines its evolution.
